name: SIBR Viewer
description: Full SIBR integration plugin. Provides ULR viewer, ULR v2/v3, textured mesh, point-based, 3D Gaussian Splatting (CUDA), remote Gaussian training monitor, and dataset preprocessing tools. All rendering capabilities are directly embedded in the plugin.

references.text: SIBR: A System for Image Based Rendering
3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering
